hotel_name: Khách sạn Lucien Quy Nhơn (Khách Sạn Lucien Hotel Quy Nhơn )

reviews.title: The hotel is quite new inside, clean, friendly staff, moderate prices, there are many local places to eat around. Soundproofing is not very good, no free drinking water in daily.
reviews.text: Quite new inside, clean, friendly staff, moderate prices, there are many local places to eat around. Soundproofing is not very good, no free drinking water in daily.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The room is really big and the facilities are good and quite new. The staffs are nice and always smile with you. I like it.

reviews.title: Deceptive sales
reviews.text: I book a room with balcony and get a room without the balcony. The size is also smaller than advertised at 30 m2.  But the price I paid is still the price with the balcony. Deceptive sales. This is quite bad
reviews.response: The room you use has the same validity period as the room with balcony. It has a more beautiful panoramic open space than the room with balcony. Area 30m2 including toilet. If you are not satisfied with the hotel's open space and panoramic room, you can change to a room with a balcony.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.positives: Their daily room rate
reviews.negatives: The hotel receptionist can not speak English and no free supply of tea bags, coffee sachets or bottled water.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Spacious rooms with bathub, reliable wifi and super clean

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Suitable parking, friendly staff, near beach and park

reviews.title: Nice location and clean hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel lights on the balcony room almost ruined out stay. The lights from the front of the hotel point directly into the room and there is no shades. Do not pay extra for a balcony room it is too bright to sleep.

Otherwise the hotel was clean and nice. But the hotel should not point lights into your own room. Also there is no way to turn off the balcony lights. The hotel should turn off the from lights at night instead of torturing their guests.

reviews.title: wonderful experience
reviews.positives: The receptionist is really supportive and friendly. The way the staff interact with each other indicate this place owner offer a healthy working environment for them leading to really comfortable and relaxing staying experience for customers, bravo for all the operation personnel at this place
reviews.negatives: It can be observed that the floor vacuum is still not completed yet. It is still sandy especially the area between the bed and the wall/ bathroom wall. I hope that it could be improved for a perfect experience. You guys are really closed to perfect, you can do it !!!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Reasonable for the price . Can stay for a short trip.
Clean room and toilet. Nothing to complain about.

reviews.title: Good hotel for short stay and bring your own water bottles.
reviews.positives: Staffs are friendly and don't bother you unless you need something from them.  Location is not to far from the beach.  Price for scooter/motorbike rental was good at 120,000 VND per day and is available at hotel.  The neighborhood has many places to eat and there a store nearby to buy water and snacks.
reviews.negatives: They charge for every little things that is of convenience such as laundry and water to drink and snacks.  Most places give you free water but this hotel charge you for water.  There is a small booklet in your room that tell you ever charge for items and if you damage something.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Great little place, still very new but some of the facilities need a bit of a check before room is occupied

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Located in the center of the city, easy to walk to the beach and go around the market. Renting scooter with reasonable price.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Great worth

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean, everything is nice. Good location. By this price the hotel is punching above his weight
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Nice hotel with adequate amenities
reviews.text: Good for the price. However the balcony room on the 2nd floor keeps creaking at night and the air con remote keeps turning on the TV

reviews.title: I will be back
reviews.positives:
central, spacious
reasonable price, very nice staffs

I love the room so muchhh

reviews.title: Cleanning
reviews.text: Room is cleanning and large.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: new & beautiful

reviews.title: Okay hotel
reviews.text: There's nothing much near there at night, not convenient to buy any snacks or food. Room are okay, for it's price, I cannot complain. Floor abit dirty, with hairs in the toilet. But otherwise, it's a okay hotel to stay for 1 night.

reviews.title: I really like this hotel
reviews.positives: The large room, so clean, location is comfortable, there are many local restaurants around hotel. Staff are very kind and polite
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: A truly cost-effective accommodation where you can taste local food.
reviews.text: This is an affordable and cost-effective accommodation. However, it seems that the information on Agoda needs to be updated. I booked a room with a balcony based on the details, but when we arrived, the room we reserved did not have a balcony. So, ventilation was a bit disappointing. I would appreciate it if you could update the details on Agoda. The advantages are that there are many local food places like restaurants and cafes nearby!! After remodeling, there might be some issues as there are slight leaks in the sink and toilet. The reception staff were also friendly and nice. They also offer motorcycle rentals, making our travel convenient. If you are sensitive about hotel cleanliness, it might be better to pass this one. There is a food street nearby with vendors selling banh xeo, banh canh, cha gio, and various pho, so if you want to experience local food or are looking for a cost-effective place to stay, I highly recommend it.

reviews.title: good to stay
reviews.positives: New building, clean and sufficient stuff. cheap price and excellent
reviews.negatives: same as the other hotel when we book at Booking.com. If we stay long day, the room cleaning service quality will go down

reviews.title: Great value for money :)
reviews.text: The hotel is a truly a great value for your money. We only paid 320,000 VND per night for 3 people. The room was nice and clean, had a very clean bathroom and even had a bathtub :) The receptionists were friendly and helped us rent motorbikes and order a taxi to the airport for a cheaper price than external offers.

reviews.title: Buen lugar
reviews.positives: Hotel bien situado, limpio, tranquilo y barato.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Khách sạn sạch sẽ, nhân viên dễ thương. Lễ tân Tuy rằng chưa niềm nở với khách lắm nhưng chấp nhận được.  Chị dọn phòng rất dễ thương.  
Phòng rộng rãi vừa Đủ cho 2 người.

reviews.title: Un hotel maravilloso
reviews.positives: El hotel está muy bien, muy cuidado, limpio y agradable. La cama era muy cómoda, la habitación enorme y muy bonita. El personal es muy amable y te ayudan en todo lo que pueden, aunque no manejen mucho el inglés. Calidad-precio excelente.

reviews.title: Luxury hotel at low price
reviews.text: This hotel is very affordable and the value for your money is amazing. The room I got is huge and looks like a five stars hotel especially the big luxury bathroom for only $12.73.

reviews.title: Muy bien
reviews.positives: La habitación es amplia y limpia, la cama es cómoda. Tiene unas vistas bonitas. El personal es muy amable y te ayuda en todo. El precio genial. Alquilan motos a buen precio y la lavandería también.

reviews.title: Decent place to stay
reviews.text: It works best if you are business travelers. Cozy place, friendly staff. The neighborhood is just fine, not too crowded.

reviews.title: Bon dans l’ensemble
reviews.positives: Belle emplacement, personnel vraiment gentil, ne parlant pas anglais, mais Google traduction fait le boulot.
reviews.negatives: La chambre n’avait pas de fenêtre, malgré que tout paraissait refait il n’y a pas longtemps, les dalles de parquet se défaisait sous le lit et il y avait une forte odeur de moisi. Très désagréable

reviews.title: 8.5 out of 10
reviews.text:
❤ Worth the money, clean, enthusiastic support staff, suitable for groups of friends and small families. The room is spacious, comfortable for 3 adults + 1 child, the Balcony room has both a standing and a sitting bathtub, more convenient for daily activities.

:( I booked a room with a Balcony but only received a room with a window for ventilation.
:( The parking lot is quite small and not very convenient.

reviews.title: Excellent rapport qualité prix
reviews.positives:
Chambre agréable et propre 
Dommage qu il n y ait pas de fenêtre ☹️
reviews.negatives: L absence de fenêtre

reviews.title: An unexpected but enjoyable trip.
reviews.text: Arriving at the hotel right during the storm season, the first night was when the water was dirty because it hadn't been fixed in time. The staff was very polite and helped with changing rooms the next day, and always provided good service in the following days, cheerfully accepting the situation for the first night. I appreciate that the hotel has good staff, deserving of 5 stars.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
La proximité du centre ville .
Personnel bienveillant
reviews.negatives: Lorsque nous sommes arrivés,  une des chambres de notre réservation était sans fenêtre avec une forte odeur de renfermé.  Nous avons demandé un changement de chambre , ce qui a été accepté un petit moment après ( avec les excuses du réceptionniste pour ce désagrément)

reviews.title: 가격대비 좋아요
reviews.text: 숙소는 양호 꾸이년 도시가 노잼

reviews.title: Bien, mais pas génial non plus
reviews.positives:
Établissement moderne. 

Localisation dans le centre de Quy Nonh, mais un peu éloigné à pied du bord de mer. 

Possibilité de louer des scooters à l’hôtel pour 120.000 VND, ce qui est pratique.
reviews.negatives:
Personnel de chambre assez intrusif qui nous a dérangé deux jours de suite, dont la première fois assez tôt dans la matinée. 

La salle de bain de notre chambre au 4ème étage donnait sur un espace vide, il ne faut pas avoir le vertige. 

Ménage quotidien approximatif, nous nous sommes demandés si les draps avaient véritablement été changés à l’issue du séjour des précédents occupants de notre chambre. 

Bouteilles d’eau et en-cas dans la chambre facturés, rien n’est offert. 

Aucun service de restauration proposé, pas même de frigo pour acheter quelques boissons à la réception.

reviews.title: Worth the money
reviews.text: I was there for three nights and I had to say that the room was spacious, clean, and quite okay. It was not a new hotel so I dont expect everything to be new. With that amount of money, I could not complain.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La propreté et la baignoire + douche !
reviews.negatives: Un peu excentré, aucun échange avec le staff à peine bonjour en réponse

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Central location.   Lots of restaurants and coffee shops in the area.  I was passing through town on a motorbike trip and found this to be a good place to stay.   No need to use the motorbike in the evening,  just walk around.  Comfortable and clean 
room.  I had a room in the back which was very quiet. I only stayed one night, but this would b be a good place to stay for a few days if you have time.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Propreté

reviews.title: Giá tốt, thuận tiện đi lại
reviews.text: Khách sạn nằm gần nhà thờ chính tòa Qui Nhơn, đi bộ ra biển 5 phút, giá tốt.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Le nom de l'hôtel, qui est aussi le nom de mon petit frère. L'emplacement. A 20 mn à pieds de la mer et pleins de commerçants autour. La terrasse que j'ai découvert plus tard.
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Comfortable hotel at good price
reviews.text: Hotel is at good local location away from the tiring tourist area. Hotel staff was helpful and courteous. Very good value.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Très bien, propre et tout en parfait état 
Les chambres sur la rue sont bruyantes (trafic de la rue)
prendre une chambre donnant sur l’arrière du bâtiment, plus spacieuse (2 lits) un peu plus chère mais super calme
personnel très serviable et sérieux ne parlant pas anglais mais communique très bien avec google traduction 
possible de louer une moto à 12 000 dong par jour

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: Very accommodating. 10 min walk to beach though.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.negatives: Pas de fenêtre dans la chambre.

reviews.title: value for money
reviews.text: Good location, clean, nice staff, but take cash only. Recomend

reviews.title: Très confortable, +++ pour la douche et la baignoire
reviews.positives:
Chambre spacieuse, avec une baignoire et une grande douche, un très bon rapport qualité prix !!
Proximité de la plage pour une nuit sur place c’était super.
reviews.negatives: Rien (:

reviews.title: Awesome for the price.
reviews.text: The room is very clean, quite well-equipped, although the air conditioning is a bit difficult to adjust. The soundproofing of the room is quite good, and the prices for other services like laundry are, in my opinion, cheap. The bathroom has hot and cold water, with strong water flow. The prices are reasonable, definitely worth a try. I will come back if I have the chance.

reviews.title: Hôtel sans surprise et à ne pas manquer
reviews.positives: Le personnel et la propreté
reviews.negatives: Le manque d originalité de la décoration très froide impersonnelle

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I stayed for one night and was very satisfied. I booked two rooms because my parents were with me. Each room was very clean, with beautifully made bathtubs and bathrooms. The beds were also quite comfortable. The hotel staff was willing to wait because I checked in quite late. Overall, it was good.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Hotel assez moderne. Chambre spacieuse et confortable. Douche + baignoire, le luxe. 
Personnel très souriant. 
Un peu à l'écart du centre mais a 2 pas du front de mer.
reviews.negatives: Rien.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I stayed in Quy Nhon for 4 nights, with 2 nights at Lucien and 2 nights at FLC. In terms of convenience, I prefer Lucien. Good price, clean and spacious rooms. The staff is always cheerful, friendly, and very supportive. The hotel even helps with early check-in if there are available rooms. The location is convenient for reaching dining spots; Tran Hung Dao area is quite bustling and has many places for a food tour. If I have the chance to return to Quy Nhon, I will definitely stop by again.

reviews.title: Meilleure qualité-prix!
reviews.positives:
Le rapport qualité prix est incroyable. 
La chambre est spacieuse, propre. 
On peut y louer un scooter, très pratique!
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Too cheap compared to the price range, the room's interior is beautifully luxurious, around 4 stars, and the staff is friendly and polite. Worth returning.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Wir hatten über Booking ein Zimmer gebucht, bei welchem in der Ausstattung Terrasse stand. Als wir ankamen, hatte das Zimmer kein Fenster, dass man öffnen kann und keine Terrasse. Wir gingen zur Rezeption und wir bekamen sofort ein neues Zimmer mit einem Fenster, und waren sehr zufrieden - also alles o. k! Super Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis!
Bei der Rezeption haben Sie uns bei der Ausleihe eines Motorbikes geholfen und wir konnten auch die Wäsche vor Ort waschen lassen. Super Lage im Stadtzentrum.

reviews.title: Good trip
reviews.text: Great help. Easy place to stay. Comfortable room at affordable rates

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Das Zimmer war angenehm hell und mit einem kleinen Balkon. Da es hochgelegen war, hat man entgegen unseren Erwartungen den Straßenlärm kaum wahrgenommen.

reviews.title: Great to stay
reviews.text: Quite a good hotel and the price I paid. Hotel was clean with friendly staff. There are many good restaurant and food stalls within a walking distance.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Hervorragendes Zimmer zu einem sehr günstigen Preis

reviews.title: Thuận tiện đi lại, giá tốt
reviews.text: Khách sạn gần nhà thờ chính toà Qui Nhơn, đi bộ ra biển 5 phút, giá tốt.

reviews.title: Quy Nhon
reviews.positives:
La struttura si trova in, una posizione centrale non lontano dalla spiaggia ed anche dal centro.. La camera era grande ed anche il bagno, tutto pulito e confortevole.
Tuttavia lo staff parla esclusivamente vietnamita per cui è risultato un po' difficoltoso comunicare (ci siamo aiutati con un traduttore), offre servizi di lavanderia, e affitto motorini, mentre invece non siamo riusciti tramite loro a prenotare autobus.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is quite new and clean, spacious with friendly and enthusiastic staff. The prices are affordable. The only downside is that the room is a bit stuffy, with no windows for ventilation, so if you enter from outside, there may be an unpleasant smell at first due to the lack of air circulation. However, I still highly recommend it because the hotel is located right on Tran Hung Dao street, in the city center with many delicious eateries and large banks nearby.

reviews.title: Super verblijf
reviews.positives: Het bad!
reviews.negatives: Het was een beetje stoffig in de kamer, alsof hij lang leeg was geweest. Verder alles heel schoon

reviews.title: A very nice surprise!
reviews.text: This is by far the best value hotel I have been to,  in Vietnam. The rooms are newly renovated with modern and comfortable furniture. The staff is very helpful. It's a 10-minute walk from the beach. I highly recommend!

reviews.title: Prijs/kwaliteit   10/10
reviews.positives:
Ik kwam vroeger aan bij het hotel dan voorzien maar kon dankzij Phàt vlug inchecken. Er wordt weinig Engels gesproken maar een vertaal app zorgt ervoor dat de communicatie zonder problemen verloopt. Zeer ruime nette kamer met prachtige badkamer. Links en rechts van het hotel lekkere koffie en belegde broodjes. Laundry om 10h00 afgeven, klaar om 17h00. Taxi naar busstation binnen 5 minuten ter plaatse. 
Dankjewel Phàt en team Hotel LUCIEN!
reviews.negatives: Niets

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: The room is big and the bathroom was huge. Amazing value for money.

직원의 친절함에 기분좋은하루 ~
룸~컨디션도 좋고 ~
조용하고~♡

reviews.title: really good

reviews.title: Excellent

금액대비 가성비 너무 좋았응
다음에도 오게되면 예약 예정임

reviews.title: The best
reviews.text: I have been at many hotels in Saigon, Hue, Danang, Hoi An, Quang ngai and Hanoi, but this is the best hotel sofa (except the luxury Melia HoTram)! The hotel is new, clean, beautiful, spacious and really nice staffs.. I was also surprise with how inexpensive the room price is, about *** per night (is it off-season?). We can not ask for anymore. I would comeback here and recommend my relatives and friends to this wonderful hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
호텔에 도착하자마자 DUY가 "안녕하세요"라며 웃으며 맞아주셨어 기분이 좋았습니다.  제가 실수로 창문없는방을 2개나 예약했는데 창문있고 더 좋은 방으로 업글해주시고 항상 웃으며 도와주셨네요. 안경끼신 한분도 택시 관광 더 싸게 할 수 있도록 도와주시고 너무 친절하셨습니다.4박5일동안 너무 편하게 지내다 갑니다.
감사합니다.

reviews.title: Should stay
reviews.text: I had a very pleasant stay here. The room was clean, comfortable, and well-maintained, which made it easy to relax after a long day. The location was also great, with convenient access to nearby attractions, restaurants, and transportation. Overall, it was a nice place to stay and I would recommend it to anyone looking for a comfortable and convenient accommodation.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
무엇보다 위치가 좋았으며,
직원들 또한 친절했다

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text:
I stayed one night and the host has been very nice and accomodating. I needed to have my bike's oil changed and they very nicely recommended le an address to do it. The room was very clean.
For some reason though, the "balcony" rooms you can pay extra for are actually only rooms with windows ? It was difficult to understand so I could be wrong.

reviews.title: Rất tệ ko nên ở, đọc các review ít điểm trc khi book ks này
reviews.negatives:
Book 3 đêm nhưng đã dọn ngay sau đêm đầu tiên !!

Mùi trong phòng ẩm mốc, nghe tiếng nước chảy nhỏ giọt cả đêm, cống có vấn đề

Cách âm rất kém, giữa 2 phòng ngăn bằng vách chứ ko phải bằng tường gạch, nên phòng kế mở tv nguyên đêm làm tôi ko thể ngủ được
Qua hôm sau ks sữa chữa cả buổi khoan đục kế bên mà ko có báo trc, sau khi tôi complain thì mới đổi cho phòng khác vừa check out ra chưa dọn. Rồi hối thúc tôi phải dọn ra ngay vì họ phải cho khách khác vào. 
Đỉnh điểm là thợ vừa khoan đục vừa hút thuốc trong phòng máy lạnh, toàn bộ các phòng thông với nhau đều nghe mùi thuốc lá
Khi tôi trả phòng còn đòi phụ thu phí 30%, trong khi tôi ko thể nghỉ ngơi đc gì ?! Tự khách sạn cũ kỹ bị hư hỏng mà còn ko thấy đc lỗi của mình ?!

nghe nói chủ ks là con gái tiệm vàng thành ra ko có đào tạo nhân viên

Nhìn trên hình thế thôi chứ cơ sở vật chất của ks rất tệ, chỉ sơn để che lấp chứ toàn mùi ẩm mốc

reviews.title: New and clean hotel!
reviews.text: The prices are very reasonable, the hotel looks newly built so all the amenities are clean and modern. The staff is extremely friendly. The hotel location is also very close to the beach, with convenient access. It’s very suitable for anyone looking for accommodation right in the city center of Quy Nhơn. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Thường thì những khách sạn khác sẽ có nước suối, trà(cf) miễn phí cho khách. Nhưng ở đây thì không có

reviews.title: Enjoyed My Stay
reviews.text: Affordable, clean hotel with nice rooms and friendly staff!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Có nhạc thư giãn, gần trung tâm
reviews.negatives: Phòng rất hôi, cả bồn rửa mặt cũng xộc mùi cống lên hôi.

reviews.title: Lucien is great
reviews.text: I’m staying at the Lucien Hotel for a few weeks. It’s clean, private, quiet and the room is great. The staff are super sweet, friendly and helpful. I feel at home. It’s a great location, coffee shops, food, ATMs, and a short walk to the beach. I take a Grab bike everywhere which cost a dollar or two. Literally zero complaints this hotel is perfect for me.

reviews.negatives: phòng phía toilet một bên không có rèm, ban đêm đèn rọi vào hơi khó ngủ, nên có rèm kéo lại để dễ ngủ hơn nếu ai đó khó ngủ,...

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Great trip.

Cách âm không tốt, phòng có mùi hơi ẩm, dù mới xây nhưng đã có vài chập choen máy lạnh, bồn rửa mặt.

reviews.title: Live close to locals

The room was very big and clean. Perfect few days relaxing thanks to this hotel! Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Good quality, reasonable prices, close to the dining area.
reviews.text:
I list some impressive points compared to the very affordable price of just 2xx.
- The area of 30m2 is larger than other hotels in the same price range.
- The hallway is carpeted, and the floor has luxurious wood like a high-end hotel.
- The bathroom is spacious, has an exhaust fan, and includes a bathtub even in the standard room.
- The design is elegant and cozy with a wooden tone.
- There is a fire alarm, electronic locks, and beautiful lighting fixtures.
- The reception staff always smiles and has a friendly attitude.
In this price range, I find the quality of the rooms and the service enjoyable. It feels like the hotel owner cares and values customer feedback.
According to a local resident, the hotel has been around for a long time, has changed its name, and has developed well, which is a good thing for local tourism. Hopefully, Quy Nhon will always satisfy tourists with such memorable accommodations.

Chắc chắn sẽ ghé lại lần 2 nếu có dịp quay lại QN 🗣️

reviews.title: A Wonderful Stay at Lucien Hotel Quy Nhon — "Một Kỳ Nghỉ Tuyệt Vời tại Khách Sạn Lucien Quy Nhơn"
reviews.text:
Lucien Hotel in Quy Nhon is a fantastic experience. Firstly, we'd like to commend the responsiveness of the staff as they accommodated our early check-in request. Our room was incredibly cozy and warmly lit. The spacious bathroom with both a shower and bathtub was a major plus. The hotel's central location made it convenient to access everything in Quy Nhon. We appreciated the option to rent motorbikes and the ample parking space. The high ceiling in the room added to the overall sense of comfort and openness. The bed was very comfortable, and the hotel was highly accommodating when we requested additional pillows, towels, and hangers.

Khách sạn Lucien ở Quy Nhơn là một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời. Đầu tiên, chúng tôi muốn khen ngợi về sự nhanh nhạy của nhân viên khi chúng tôi yêu cầu nhận phòng sớm. Phòng của chúng tôi rất thoải mái và đặc biệt ấm áp, đèn chiếu sáng rất đẹp. Phòng tắm rộng lớn với cả vòi sen và bồn tắm, đó là điểm cộng lớn. Khách sạn nằm ở vị trí trung tâm, thuận tiện di chuyển đến mọi nơi ở Quy Nhơn. Chúng tôi cũng thích việc có dịch vụ thuê xe máy và chỗ đỗ xe đầy đủ. Trần phòng rất cao, tạo cảm giác thoải mái và thoáng đãng. Giường ngủ cũng rất êm ái, và khi chúng tôi yêu cầu thêm gối, khăn tắm và móc treo, khách sạn đã phục vụ rất nhiệt tình.

reviews.title: Tuyệt
reviews.positives: Phòng rất rộng, đầy đủ tiện nghi sang trọng thoải mái, giá phải chăng, có dịp sẽ quay lại và giới thiệu với bạn bè. Có sổ tay hướng dẫn các điểm mua sắm, cà phê, vui chơi, giải trí, đánh giá cao điểm này và ko có nhiều ks làm được.
reviews.negatives: Sàn phòng không chắc chắn, không dám đi mạnh sợ bị hỏng.

reviews.text:
I booked a room with a balcony, but on that day, there was a guest who checked out of the balcony room late. However, the staff was very attentive in arranging a larger alternative room for me and accommodating my special requests. I rate the service here as that of a 3-star hotel, even though this is a 2-star hotel.

As for the bedroom, the furnishings are modern, cozy, clean, and comfortable.

Additionally, I also rented a motorcycle for transportation, and the receptionists provided enthusiastic advice. On the last day when heading to the airport, due to an issue with the taxi I booked, the receptionist immediately called for a taxi to ensure I made my flight, and he also thoughtfully arranged for a low-cost yet good-quality car for me. I believe this will be the hotel I stay at during my next visits to Quy Nhơn.

reviews.title: Best in its price range.
reviews.text: If you have read other reviews mentioning things like the blanket having a smell of sunshine or needing extra curtains... you can rest assured that everything has been completely improved. The bedding is fresh, rooms are cleaned daily, the staff is friendly, and the rooms are clean and modern, up to 4-star standards at a 1-star price. There are private roller blinds, and the room is equipped with everything from a hairdryer, kettle, refrigerator, and there’s even a microwave and simple borrowing items on the lower floor. The motorbikes for rent are very comfortable, with some available for free. Overall, "wonderful" is the accurate term, but it feels understated and humble for this hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent & Hospitable Local Hotel
reviews.text:
I booked a one night stay here and have decided to stay longer. It has been close to three weeks so far and the experience has been very pleasant.

Lucien Hotel is newly built, located on a main street in a local ward and away from the mass tourist crowd. The location offers local markets, restaurants and sandwich shops, all within walking distance. There's a cafe next door and a TH Yogurt store right across the street. A noodle restaurant that's popular with locals is also right across the street.

The staff has been very hospitable. Nguyen, the manager who is also working as receptionist, is very accommodative to my mother and I. He's quick to answer our questions and took care of all of our requests. Nguyen was very supportive when my mom got sick and we feel fortunate to have stayed at this hotel with him managing the place. He's an assertive go-getter who solves problems and always go above and beyond in customer service, traits that I find rare these days.

This is an excellent family-run hotel. They have been assertive in responding to customer demands and are constantly improving to better serve their guests. My mother and I will continue to stay at this hotel until we depart Quy Nhon, which could be months later.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Mình đặt 1 phòng (14/8) ở đây qua Agoda, thật sự rất thất vọng về chuyện khách sạn tự ý huỷ phòng của khách. Mình chỉ được huỷ phòng trước ngày đi là 1 ngày nhưng mình có huỷ đâu? Vào ngày 14/8 Khách sạn bảo là có nhắn tin cho mình (qua app Agoda) để confirm xem mình có tới không nhưng mình di chuyển nhiều không check và rep được nên khách sạn tự ý huỷ phòng của mình để cho khách khác thuê trong khi Agoda vẫn bắt mình nhập số thẻ tín dụng để charge phí?. Mình đã phải tìm phòng khác trong sự mệt mỏi.
Hi vọng sau này khách sạn sẽ không tự ý huỷ phòng của khách như vậy. Xin cảm ơn và không hẹn gặp lại.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Khi nhận phòng gia đình tôi đã rất phấn khích và ngạc nhiên vì phòng khách sạn vượt quá mong đợi. 
Khách sạn mới, rất sạch sẽ, trang thiết bị hiện đại, đầy đủ, sang xịn mịn. 
Cùng tầm tiền này ngoài Quy Nhơn ra không thể tìm được khách sạn nào chất lượng tương đương như vậy.
Ks ở trung tâm, gần biển, quanh ks rất nhiều hàng ăn ngon bổ rẻ. 
Mình có chuyến xuyên Việt dài ngày và đây là khách sạn tốt nhất mình từng ở. 
Rất yêu Quy Nhơn và khách sạn Lucien.
Chúc Lucien luôn full phòng ❤️❤️❤️

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Rất okie và đáng tiền
reviews.positives: Okila mọi người ạ, phòng sạch, nhân viên dễ thương, khách sạn ở trung tâm dễ ăn uống di chuyển, đi xe máy vài km để ra biển nhưng mình thấy cũng gần.
reviews.negatives: Gối hơi cứng

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Khách sạn to, rộng, vị trí cũng ổn. Điều mình thất vọng nhất là hệ thống thoát nước của phòng, nhà wc dài, rộng nhưng nước thoát rất chậm. Mình gội đầu với tắm là lội nước bì bõm, gội tối mà sáng hôm sau mới thoát hết nước. Nhân viên dọn phòng cũng không vệ sinh sàn wc, vì những vết bẩn mình thấy còn nguyên, dù mình tự dọn tóc sau khi gội khỏi nắp cống trước đó rồi. Có thể do mình không hỏi kĩ về thuê xe, xe mình thuê từ 8h tối 18 đến 8h sáng 21 trả phòng bị tính 3 ngày, mình thấy chính sách thuê như vậy hơi không ổn.

reviews.title: Mới và khá tiện nghi
reviews.text:
Ksan nằm trung tâm tp QNhon. Tiện đi các địa điểm du lịch. 
Điểm cộng là khá mới, design hiện đại, sang trọng; giường êm, rộng rãi. Nhìn chung oke. 

Điểm trừ: tự ý thay đổi phòng khi chưa thông báo.
Mùi nvs hơi hôi, chắc do bữa đó trời mưa.
